allow: Bash(openclaw --help 2>/dev/null || which openclaw 2>/dev/null || echo "openclaw not found in PATH")

Bash(jq '.agents.list[] |= if .id == "cqfz-develop" then .identity.name = "CQFZ 核心开发团队" else . end' ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json > /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp && mv /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)

Bash(jq '.agents.list[] |= if .id == "cqfz-develop" then .id = "cqfz-core-develop" else . end' ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json > /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp && mv /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)
Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | jq '.agents.list[] | select\(.id | contains\("cqfz-develop"\) or .id == "cqfz-develop" or .id == "cqfz-core-develop"\)' 2>/dev/null)

Bash(jq '.agents.routing.rules[] |= if .agentId == "cqfz-develop" then .agentId = "cqfz-core-develop" else . end' ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json > /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp && mv /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)

Bash(jq '.agents.list[] |= if .id == "cqfz-develop" then \(.id = "cqfz-core-develop" | .identity.name = "CQFZ 核心开发团队"\) else . end' ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json > /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp && mv /tmp/openclaw.json.tmp ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)
Bash(for agent in main cqfz-core-develop cqfz-edge-computing cqfz-ai-platform cqfz-presales project-manager)
Bash(openclaw skills list 2>&1 | grep -A 200 "Available skills" | head -80)

Bash(openclaw agent --to cqfz-ai-platform --message "请全面推进企业大模型服务平台项目的开发。当前待完成任务：
1. API Server 业务逻辑完善（控制器目前是骨架）
2. 数据库迁移脚本
3. Keycloak 集成对接
4. Kong 网关配置完善
5. IDE 插件开发
6. 端到端测试
7. 部署脚本测试
8. CI/CD 流水线

请协调团队各子 Agent 分工协作，逐步完成这些任务。项目路径：/root/projects/enterprise-llm-platform" --deliver 2>&1)

Bash(openclaw agent --to cqfz-ai-platform --channel webchat --message "请全面推进企业大模型服务平台项目的开发。当前待完成任务：
1. API Server 业务逻辑完善（控制器目前是骨架）
2. 数据库迁移脚本
3. Keycloak 集成对接
4. Kong 网关配置完善
5. IDE 插件开发
6. 端到端测试
7. 部署脚本测试
8. CI/CD 流水线

请协调团队各子 Agent 分工协作，逐步完成这些任务。项目路径：/root/projects/enterprise-llm-platform" 2>&1 | head -100)
